I

IGNORE_CONSTRAINTS - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.Container.Mode
Ignore component constraints during layout.
ImageBuffer - Class in microui.core
A spatial view component for displaying and manipulating images with color tinting.

Constructs an ImageBuffer with default properties.
insert(int, char) - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Inserts a character at the specified position.
insert(int, char) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Inserts a character at the specified position.
insert(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Inserts a number at the specified position.
insert(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Inserts a number at the specified position.

Inserts a string at the specified position.
insert(int, String) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Inserts a string at the specified position.
insertChar(char) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Inserts a character at the current cursor position.
insertCharForLine(int, int, char) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Inserts a character at a specific position in a line.
insertLine(int, String) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Inserts a new line with the specified text at the given index.
insertLine(String) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Inserts a new line with the specified text at the current cursor row.
insertString(String) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Inserts a string at the current cursor position.
insertStringForLine(int, int, String) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Inserts a string at a specific position in a line.
InteractionHandler - Class in microui.event
Advanced event handler that manages event listeners and dispatches events to registered callbacks.
InteractionHandler(SpatialView) - Constructor for class microui.event.InteractionHandler
Constructs an InteractionHandler for the specified SpatialView.

Checks if alpha fade-out effect is enabled.
isAnimatorEasingEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Checks if easing is enabled for animations.
isAnimatorEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Checks if the animator is enabled.
isAutoClearBufferEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Checks if the buffer is automatically cleared before each render cycle.
isAutoResizeModeEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.TextView
Checks if automatic text resizing is enabled.
isBlank() - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Checks if the entire text content is blank (contains only whitespace).
isBlank() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the text content is blank (empty).
isChecked() - Method in class microui.component.CheckBox
Gets the current checked state of the checkbox.
isChecked() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Gets the checked state of the checkbox.
isClick() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component has just been clicked (press + release).
isClick() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a click event occurred (press and release while hovering).
isClipModeEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.TextView
Checks if text clipping to bounds is enabled.
isColliding(SpatialView, SpatialView) - Static method in class microui.util.MathUtils
Checks if two spatial views are colliding (overlapping).
isComplete() - Method in class microui.util.Timer
Checks if the timer has reached either endpoint.
isConstrainDimensionsEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Checks if dimension constraints are enabled.
isConstrainEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Checks if character constraints are enabled.
isDimensionsEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Checks if dimension animation is enabled.
isDoubleClick() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component has just been double-clicked.
isDoubleClick() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a double-click event occurred (two clicks within time threshold).
isDragEnd() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if a drag operation has just ended on the component.
isDragEnd() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a drag end event occurred (mouse released after dragging).
isDragging() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component is currently being dragged.
isDragging() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if the mouse is currently dragging this component.
isDragStart() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if a drag operation has just started on the component.
isDragStart() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a drag start event occurred (mouse moved while pressed).
isEditable() - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Checks if the text area is editable.
isEmpty() - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Checks if the menu contains any items.
isEmpty() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Checks if the text field is empty.
isEmpty() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Checks if the text content is empty.
isEmpty() - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Checks if the text content is empty.
isEmpty() - Static method in class microui.util.Clipboard
Checks if the clipboard is empty.
isEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Hover
Checks if the hover effect is enabled.
isEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Ripples
Checks if the ripple effect is enabled.
isEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Checks if the animator is enabled.
isEnabled() - Method in class microui.event.InteractionHandler
Checks if this interaction handler is enabled.
isEnabled() - Static method in class microui.util.Debugger
Checks if debug mode is currently enabled.
isEnter() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the mouse has just entered the component's bounds.
isEnter() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a mouse enter event occurred (mouse moved into component bounds).
isEnterLong() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the mouse has been hovering over the component for an extended period.
isEnterLong() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if an enter-long event occurred (mouse hovered for extended duration).
isFocused() - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Checks if the text area currently has keyboard focus.
isFocused() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Checks if the text field currently has keyboard focus.
isHotKeySwitchEnabled() - Static method in class microui.util.Debugger
Checks if hotkey switching of debug mode is enabled.
isHover() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the mouse is currently hovering over the component.
isHover() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if the mouse is currently hovering over this component.
isHoverEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Checks if hover effects are enabled for this component.
isHoverEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.AbstractButton
Checks if hover effects are enabled.
isIncrementing() - Method in class microui.util.Timer
Checks if the timer is currently incrementing.
isInitialized() - Static method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Checks if the ContainerManager has been initialized.
isInteractionHandlerEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the interaction handler is enabled for this component.
isLaunched() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Ripples
Checks if a ripple animation is currently running.
isLeave() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the mouse has just left the component's bounds.
isLeave() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a mouse leave event occurred (mouse moved out of component bounds).
isLeaveLong() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the mouse has left after a long hover period.
isLeaveLong() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a leave-long event occurred (mouse stayed out for extended duration).
isLoaded() - Method in class microui.core.ImageBuffer
Checks if an image is currently loaded in the buffer.
isLongPress() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if a long press is currently occurring on the component.
isLongPress() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a long-press event occurred (mouse held for extended duration).
isLoopEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.style.GradientLoopColor
Checks if looping animation is currently enabled.
isMarginEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Checks if margin is enabled.
isMultiLineSelected() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the selection spans multiple lines.
isOpen() - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Checks if the menu is currently open.
isPaddingEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Checks if padding is enabled.
isPasswordModeEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Checks if password mode is enabled.
isPasswordModeEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Checks if password mode is enabled.
isPositionEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Checks if position animation is enabled.
isPreparedClose() - Method in class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Checks if the tooltip is prepared to close.
isPreparedClose() - Method in class microui.feedback.TooltipContent
Determines if the tooltip is prepared to be closed.
isPreparedShow() - Method in class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Checks if the tooltip is prepared to show.
isPreparedShow() - Method in class microui.feedback.TooltipContent
Determines if the tooltip is prepared to be shown.
isPress() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component is currently being pressed (mouse button down over component).
isPress() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a mouse press event occurred in the current frame.
isPressed() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component is in a pressed state (mouse down over component).
isPressed() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if the mouse is currently pressed on this component.
isRelease() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component is currently being released (mouse button up after press).
isRelease() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if a mouse release event occurred in the current frame.
isReleased() - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Checks if the component is in a released state (not pressed).
isReleased() - Method in class microui.event.Event
Checks if the mouse is currently released (not pressed) on this component.
isRipplesEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.AbstractButton
Checks if ripple effects are enabled.
isTextConstrainEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Checks if text length constraint is enabled.
isTextVisible() - Method in class microui.component.Button
Checks whether the button's text is currently visible.
isTextVisible() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Checks if the label text is visible.
isThumbClicked() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Checks if the thumb is currently being clicked.
isThumbHoverEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Checks if hover effects are enabled on the thumb.
isThumbRipplesEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Checks if ripple effects are enabled on the thumb.
isTransparent() - Method in class microui.core.style.Color
Checks if this color is fully transparent.
isValidationEnabled() - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Checks if input validation is enabled.
isValidationEnabled() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Checks if text validation is enabled.

Validates if a character is allowed based on the current validation mode.
isValidChar(char) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Validates if a character is allowed based on standard validation rules.
isVerticalMode() - Method in class microui.layout.LinearLayout
Returns whether the layout is in vertical mode.
isVisible() - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Checks whether the element is visible.
isVisible() - Method in class microui.core.BufferedView
Checks if the view is currently visible and should be rendered.
isVisible() - Method in interface microui.core.interfaces.Visible
Checks whether the component is currently visible.
